author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Crew Packs Tomorrow and Airdrop Notice

One. More. Day.

We're just as excited as you all are for the Crew Packs launch tomorrow. We’ll keep you updated on the exact launch time, we’re still finalizing it and don’t want to give you anything inaccurate so bear with us there. 

As for the airdrop, it’s dropping into your https://play.staratlas.com/ inventories TONIGHT. Keep an eye out, and we’ll announce when it’s gone live.
